performance.notes: Animation timing verified via tailwind.config.js: 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1). No load testing performed — reuses existing PUT endpoint. Existing API performance baselines apply (P95 < 500ms).

owasp_checks.notes: No auth layer — single-user local tool
All inputs rendered to value= attrs; server validates and trims fields
Optimistic update + rollback; read-only during active run guard
No new endpoints; existing PUT reused
React 19 + Zustand — no new dependencies introduced
Server uses writeColumn atomic write; optimistic update with rollback
console.error on server errors; acceptable for local dev tool
No URL fetching from user input

test_cases.description: Panel hidden when detailTask is null
Panel renders when detailTask is set
Title input pre-populated with task title
Assigned input pre-populated with task assigned
Description textarea pre-populated with task description
Short ID chip shown in header (last 7 chars)
Footer shows createdAt and updatedAt labels
Close button triggers closeDetailPanel
Backdrop click triggers closeDetailPanel
Escape key triggers closeDetailPanel
Title auto-save on blur with changed value
No updateTask call when title unchanged at blur
Empty title reverts to last saved value
Assigned auto-save on blur with changed value
Empty assigned sends empty string to API
Type auto-save on click to different type
No save when same type button clicked
Description explicit save on button click
All inputs disabled during isMutating=true
Save button disabled during isMutating, shows Saving...
Inputs disabled when activeRun matches task id
Warning banner shown during activeRun for same task
Inputs NOT disabled when activeRun is for different task
ARIA: role=dialog and aria-modal=true
ARIA: aria-label=Task detail
ARIA: close button has aria-label=Close task detail
openDetailPanel sets detailTask
openDetailPanel replaces existing detailTask
closeDetailPanel sets detailTask to null
closeDetailPanel is no-op when already closed
updateTask calls api.updateTask with spaceId, taskId, patch
updateTask applies optimistic board update before API resolves
updateTask reconciles detailTask with server response
updateTask shows success toast after successful update
updateTask sets isMutating=false on success
updateTask rolls back board tasks on API error
updateTask rolls back detailTask on API error
updateTask shows error toast on failure
updateTask sets isMutating=false on error
updateTask updates in-progress column correctly
updateTask updates done column correctly
isMutating is true while updateTask API call in-flight
Expand icon opens detail panel (stopPropagation confirmed)
test_cases.notes: Verified via TaskCard code review: onClick calls openDetailPanel(task)

test_cases.description: Title button on card opens detail panel
test_cases.notes: Verified via TaskCard code review: title rendered as <button> calling openDetailPanel

test_cases.description: TaskDetailPanel mounted at App root above board
test_cases.notes: Verified in App.tsx line 116: <TaskDetailPanel /> placed after Board, z-50

test_cases.description: Focus returns to trigger element on panel close
test_cases.notes: useEffect tracking prevDetailTask: triggerRef.current.focus() called on null transition

test_cases.description: Focus trap cycles through focusable elements on Tab
test_cases.notes: useFocusTrap hook verified: wraps first/last on Tab/Shift+Tab; requires manual keyboard test

test_cases.description: Slide-in animation completes within 200ms
No XSS via task title rendering
test_cases.notes: Title rendered as input value={} — no innerHTML; XSS surface absent

test_cases.description: No XSS via description rendering
test_cases.notes: Description rendered as textarea value={} — safe

test_cases.description: Server validates title maxLength=200
Server validates assigned maxLength=50
Empty body rejected by server
test_cases.notes: Server returns 400 when no UPDATABLE_FIELDS present

test_cases.description: Extra properties in body handled gracefully
test_cases.notes: Server only reads UPDATABLE_FIELDS; extra keys silently ignored

test_cases.description: Save description button disabled when description unchanged
test_cases.notes: BUG-001: Button is only disabled by isMutating/activeRun — no dirty-state check implemented

test_cases.description: Expand icon minimum 44x44px touch target
test_cases.notes: BUG-002: Expand icon is w-6 h-6 (24x24px) — below WCAG 2.5.8 minimum of 24x24dp; Story 1.2 requires 44x44px

test_cases.description: Type segmented control has role=radiogroup on wrapper
test_cases.notes: BUG-003: Wrapper uses role=group instead of role=radiogroup; individual buttons have role=radio + aria-checked
